hmong.vocal_warm_ups: Cov Kev Ua Kom Suab Sov
hmong.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Rov qab mus rau daim ntawv teev cov cuab yeej STEM Lab
hmong.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Nkag — qhia cov lus nug qhib
hmong.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Kuv to taub lawm — piav nrog kuv cov lus
hmong.interval_singer: Tus Hu Nkauj Sib Npaug Suab
hmong.how_sharp_or_flat_you_are_aim_for_the_: Koj siab los qis npaum li cas. Tsom rau thaj tsam ntsuab nruab nrab (±10 cents).
hmong.your_pitch_over_time_mapped_to_musical: Koj qib suab raws sijhawm, muab qhia rau cov ntawv suab paj nruag. Ntsuab = raug, daj = ze, liab = suab yuam kev.
hmong.piano_roll_showing_pitch_history_green: Piano roll qhia keeb kwm qib suab. Kab ntsuab qhia kev hu raug (hauv 10 cents), daj qhia ze (hauv 25 cents), liab qhia suab yuam kev (tshaj 25 cents).
hmong.reference_tones: Cov Suab Siv Ua Piv Txwv
hmong.click_a_note_to_hear_the_tone_try_to_m: Nias ib lub suab kom hnov nws. Sim ua kom haum nrog koj lub suab!
hmong.pitch_match_game: Kev Ua Si Sib Haum Qib Suab
hmong.a_tone_plays_match_it_with_your_voice_: Ib lub suab tshuab — ua kom haum nrog koj lub suab! Tuav qib suab raug ib vib nas this. Cov qhab nia yog raws li ceev.
hmong.sing_this_note_and_hold_it_within_10_c: Hu lub suab no thiab tuav nws hauv 10 cents rau ib vib nas this
hmong.cancel_pitch_match_game: Thim kev ua si sib haum qib suab
hmong.this_will_guide_you_through_finding_yo: Qhov no yuav coj koj mus nrhiav koj lub suab qis tshaj thiab siab tshaj uas xis nyob. Ua kom paub tseeb tias lub microphone qhib lawm.
hmong.sing_your_lowest_comfortable_note: Hu koj lub suab qis tshaj uas xis nyob
hmong.hold_the_note_steady_for_about_1_secon: Tuav lub suab kom ruaj li ib vib nas this.
hmong.cancel_vocal_range_test_low_range: Thim kev sim qib suab (qib qis)
hmong.now_sing_your_highest_comfortable_note: Nim no hu koj lub suab siab tshaj uas xis nyob
hmong.cancel_vocal_range_test_high_range: Thim kev sim qib suab (qib siab)
hmong.closest_range_template: Tus qauv qib suab ze tshaj:
hmong.estimated_from_your_lowest_note_true_v: Kwv yees los ntawm koj lub suab qis tshaj — hom suab tiag tiag kuj nyob ntawm qib suab uas xis nyob (tessitura) thiab yam suab, tsis yog qib suab xwb.
hmong.restart_vocal_range_test: Rov pib kev sim qib suab
hmong.your_range_on_the_keyboard: Koj Qib Suab Ntawm Lub Keyboard
hmong.piano_keyboard_showing_vocal_range_use: Lub keyboard piano qhia qib suab. Siv cov xub sab laug/sab xis los txav ntawm cov suab, Enter los yog Space los tshuab.
hmong.start_singing_a_sustained_note: Pib hu ib lub suab uas rub ntev.
hmong.very_little_pitch_variation_good_for_c: Qib suab hloov tsawg heev. Zoo rau kev sib xyaw ua pawg hu nkauj!
hmong.vibrato_rate_is_above_8_hz_try_to_rela: Tus nqi vibrato siab dua 8 Hz. Sim so thiab ua qeeb.
hmong.vibrato_rate_is_below_4_hz_try_to_ener: Tus nqi vibrato qis dua 4 Hz. Sim ntxiv zog rau koj cov cua ntws.
hmong.vibrato_width_exceeds_100_cents_try_fo: Qhov dav vibrato tshaj 100 cents. Tsom rau qhov co nqaim dua.
hmong.beautiful_rate_and_depth_are_in_the_id: Zoo nkauj! Tus nqi thiab qhov tob nyob hauv qhov zoo tshaj.
hmong.getting_there_aim_for_5_7_hz_rate_and_: Ze lawm! Tsom rau tus nqi 5-7 Hz thiab qhov tob 30-80 cents.
hmong.sustain_a_note_with_no_vibrato_practic: Rub ib lub suab tsis muaj vibrato. Xyaum tswj koj lub suab kom nws ruaj tag nrho.
hmong.sustain_a_note_and_let_your_natural_vi: Rub ib lub suab thiab cia koj tus vibrato ntuj tso tshwm. Tsis txhob yuam nws — so thiab cia nws tshwm.
hmong.try_to_vibrate_at_exactly_6_hz_6_oscil: Sim co raws nraim 6 Hz (6 zaug hauv ib vib nas this). Saib tus nqi nyeem.
hmong.try_to_keep_vibrato_depth_around_50_ce: Sim khaws qhov tob vibrato kwv yees li 50 cents. Tsis dav dhau, tsis nqaim dhau.
hmong.sustain_a_note_to_see_your_vibrato_pat: Rub ib lub suab kom pom koj tus qauv vibrato. Kab nruab nrab yog koj qib suab nruab nrab.
hmong.vibrato_waveform_trace_showing_pitch_d: Kab duab nthwv vibrato qhia qib suab txav deb raws sijhawm
hmong.set_interval_direction_to_up: Teeb kev taw sib npaug suab mus rau saum
hmong.set_interval_direction_to_down: Teeb kev taw sib npaug suab mus rau hauv
hmong.staff_notation_showing_reference_targe: Cov ntawv suab ntawm kab suab qhia tus piv txwv, lub hom phiaj, thiab koj lub suab tam sim no
hmong.skip_this_interval: Hla qhov sib npaug suab no
hmong.interval_accuracy: Kev Raug ntawm Sib Npaug Suab
hmong.vocal_anatomy_explorer: Tus Tshawb Nrhiav Cev Nqaij Daim Tawv ntawm Suab
hmong.explore_how_your_body_makes_sound_clic: Tshawb nrhiav seb koj lub cev ua suab li cas. Nias ib cheeb tsam kom kawm txog nws, los yog khiav cov animation kom pom nws ua haujlwm.
hmong.sagittal_cross_section_diagram_of_the_: Daim duab txiav hlais ncaj ntawm txoj kev suab ntawm tib neeg. Siv cov xub sab laug/sab xis los txav ntawm cov cheeb tsam, Enter los yog Space los xaiv.
hmong.role_in_singing: Lub luag haujlwm hauv kev hu nkauj:
hmong.common_injuries: ⚠️ Cov kev raug mob niaj hnub:
hmong.vocal_injuries_prevention: Kev Raug Mob ntawm Suab thiab Kev Tiv Thaiv
hmong.top_prevention_tips: Cov Lus Qhia Tiv Thaiv Zoo Tshaj
hmong.common_vocal_injuries: Cov Kev Raug Mob ntawm Suab Niaj Hnub
hmong.understanding_these_conditions_helps_y: Kev to taub cov xwm txheej no pab koj paub cov cim ceeb toom ntxov. Yog tias koj muaj cov tsos mob tsis tu ncua, mus ntsib kws kho mob.
hmong.this_information_is_educational_only_i: 👨‍⚕️ Cov ntaub ntawv no yog rau kev kawm xwb. Nws tsis yog kev tawm tswv yim kho mob. Yog tias koj txhawj txog koj lub suab, mus ntsib kws kho pob ntseg-qhov ntswg-caj pas los yog kws kho lus.
hmong.cancel_warm_up_exercise: Thim kev xyaum ua kom suab sov
hmong.vocal_health_tips: Cov Lus Qhia Txog Kev Noj Qab Haus Huv ntawm Suab
hmong.get_personalized_vocal_health_tips_app: Tau txais cov lus qhia txog kev noj qab haus huv ntawm suab uas haum rau koj qib kawm.
hmong.loading_tips: Tab tom rub cov lus qhia…
hmong.refresh_tips: 🔁 Rov Ua Cov Lus Qhia Tshiab
hmong.breathing_for_singing: Kev Ua Pa rau Kev Hu Nkauj
hmong.breathe_deep_into_your_belly_diaphragm: Ua pa tob rau hauv koj lub plab (diaphragm), tsis yog rau hauv lub hauv siab.
hmong.keep_your_core_engaged_to_control_airf: Khaws koj cov leeg nruab nrab ua haujlwm los tswj cov cua ntws thaum hu nkauj.
hmong.let_the_air_flow_smoothly_and_evenly_t: Cia cov cua ntws mus du thiab sib npaug hla koj txoj hlua suab.
hmong.feet_shoulder_width_apart_weight_balan: Ob txhais ko taw nrug li lub xub pwg, lub hnyav sib npaug
hmong.shoulders_relaxed_and_rolled_back_not_: Ob lub xub pwg so thiab dov rov qab (tsis txhob khoov)
hmong.chin_level_not_tilted_up_or_down: Puab tsaig ncaj — tsis yaug rau saum los yog rau hauv
hmong.jaw_relaxed_and_slightly_dropped_when_: Puab tsaig so thiab poob me ntsis thaum hu nkauj
hmong.avoid_locking_knees_tensing_neck_or_cl: Zam: kev xauv hauv caug, ua kom cij nqaij caj dab, los yog zom puab tsaig
hmong.read_the_notes_on_the_staff_and_sing_t: Nyeem cov suab ntawm kab suab thiab hu lawv raws li. Kev txheeb qib suab tam sim ntawd xyuas koj kev raug.
hmong.choose_a_melody: Xaiv ib zaj suab paj nruag:
hmong.note_by_note_results: Cov Txiaj Ntsig Suab Zuj Zus
hmong.sing_5_intervals_correctly: Hu 5 qhov sib npaug suab kom raug
hmong.singing_and_vocal_lab: Chav Kuaj Hu Nkauj thiab Suab
hmong.pitch_training_vocal_range_vibrato_int: Kev cob qhia qib suab, qib suab, vibrato, thiab kev hu sib npaug suab
hmong.singing_lab_sections: Cov Ntu ntawm Chav Kuaj Hu Nkauj
hmong.sing_into_the_mic_the_lab_tracks_frequ: Hu rau hauv lub microphone; chav kuaj taug qab tus zaus tam sim ntawd. Cov neeg hu nkauj uas kawm los tuav qib suab hauv ±5 cents (1/20 ntawm ib nrab suab) — qhov suab raug tiag tiag nrov li no.
hmong.most_untrained_voices_span_1_5_2_octav: Feem ntau cov suab uas tsis tau kawm nthuav 1.5-2 octave; cov neeg hu nkauj classical uas kawm los mus txog 3 los ntau dua. Kev nthuav qib suab feem ntau yog txog kev sib xyaw cov register, tsis yog kev rub mus saum thiab hauv xwb.
hmong.healthy_vibrato_5_7_hz_oscillation_60_: Vibrato zoo: co 5-7 Hz, nrog qhov dav ~60-100 cents. Qeeb dua = co; ceev dua = tshee. Vibrato yog ib txoj haujlwm ntawm kev txhawb pa uas so, tsis yog ib txoj tswv yim cais tawm.
hmong.interval_singer_ear_training: Tus Hu Nkauj Sib Npaug Suab — Kev Cob Qhia Pob Ntseg
hmong.major_3rd_vs_minor_3rd_is_the_single_m: Major 3rd vs minor 3rd yog khub sib npaug suab uas tsim kev tsis meej tshaj rau cov neeg pib. Cov lus qhia nco: major 3rd = "Oh when the saints", minor 3rd = "Greensleeves". Tsim kev mloog sib piv.
hmong.lip_trills_sirens_before_any_sustained: Kev co di ncauj + siren ua ntej txhua qhov kev hu rub ntev. 5-10 feeb ntawm kev ua kom suab sov qhov qis txo txoj kev pheej hmoo ntawm kev siv txoj hlua suab ntau dhau ib nrab. Kev hla kev ua kom suab sov yog qhov ua rau kev raug mob suab uas tiv thaiv tau tus naj npawb 1.
hmong.solf_ge_do_re_mi_letter_names_for_sigh: Solfège (do-re-mi) zoo dua cov npe tsav ntawv rau kev nyeem suab vim cov lus qhia txog kev sib txheeb ntawm sib npaug suab, tsis yog cov cim qib suab xwb. Movable do zoo dua fixed do rau suab paj nruag tonal.
hmong.resonance_lab_discover_your_vocal_tone: Chav Kuaj Suab Nrov — Nrhiav Koj Yam Suab
hmong.two_sliders_throat_openness_and_soft_p: Ob tug slider — qhov qhib ntawm caj pas thiab kev tsa qhov ncauj mos — sib koom ua plaub yam zoo ntawm yam suab (nplua nuj, ci, sov, ntswg). Tsis muaj qhab nia, tsis muaj kev nthuav tawm: sim, sau tseg, thiab piav qhia qhov koj nrhiav tau.
hmong.operatic_professional_tone_full_resona: Yam suab opera / kws txawj. Suab nrov puv.
hmong.forward_placement_pop_belt_style: Muab tso rau pem hauv ntej. Style pop / belting.
hmong.tight_resonance_often_unintended: Suab nrov nyuaj. Feem ntau tsis tau npaj.
hmong.sliders_for_throat_openness_soft_palat: Cov slider rau qhov qhib ntawm caj pas, kev tsa qhov ncauj mos. Kev faib cais nrog 4 yam suab. Tsis muaj qhab nia, tsis muaj kev nthuav tawm.
hmong.hypothesis_what_anatomical_adjustments: Kev twv: Cov kev hloov cev nqaij daim tawv twg tsim yam suab nplua nuj?
hmong.why_do_classical_singers_lift_the_pala: Vim li cas cov neeg hu nkauj classical tsa qhov ncauj?
hmong.how_does_throat_openness_affect_overto: Qhov qhib ntawm caj pas cuam tshuam li cas rau overtone series?
hmong.explain_how_resonance_cavity_shape_con: Piav qhia seb qhov puab qhov suab nrov tswj yam suab li cas.
hmong.design_note_discrete_4_tone_marker_no_: Cov ntawv sau tsim: 4 yam suab cais; tsis muaj qhab nia acoustic; tsis muaj kev nthuav tawm — ua tib zoo.
